title: Sign in with valid credentials
description: A citizen can submit valid credentials and arrive at the authenticated dashboard.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the authenticated dashboard is displayed
Verify personalized dashboard content is displayed

title: Block dashboard access without authentication
description: An unauthenticated visitor is prevented from viewing protected dashboard content and is prompted to log in again.

steps.description: Navigate to /dashboard
Verify protected content is not displayed
Verify a prompt to log in again is displayed

title: View the login form
description: A visitor can open the login page and see the authentication form.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Verify the login form is displayed
Verify email and password inputs are displayed

title: View the landing page introduction
description: An anonymous visitor can load the landing page and see the platform introduction content.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Verify the landing page introduction is displayed
Verify primary navigation or entry points are displayed

title: Return to the landing page from an unknown route
description: A visitor who opens an unknown URL sees a 404 page and can get back to the landing page.

steps.description: Navigate to /unknown-page
Verify a 404 page is displayed
Verify a way back to the landing page is displayed

title: View the dashboard after authentication
description: An authenticated citizen can open the dashboard and see personalized government service content.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Click the dashboard entry point
Verify personalized dashboard content is displayed
Verify government service guidance or discovery content is displayed

title: Reach login from the landing page
description: An anonymous visitor can use the landing page to navigate to the login page.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Click the link to open the login page
Verify the login form is displayed

title: Use the landing page with accessible navigation
description: An anonymous visitor can access the landing page with a high-contrast, keyboard-navigable experience.

steps.description: Navigate to /
Press Tab to move through the main navigation
Verify keyboard focus moves through interactive elements in a usable order
Verify the landing page content remains readable and accessible

title: Stay on login when credentials are invalid
description: A visitor who submits invalid credentials sees login feedback and remains on the login page.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with invalid@example.com
Fill in the password field with incorrect-password
Submit the login form
Verify a login validation or authentication error is displayed
Verify the login form remains displayed

title: Keep login controls valid and usable while signing in
description: A visitor sees the login form support a polished sign-in experience while submitting credentials.

steps.description: Navigate to /login
Fill in the email field with {{LOGIN_USER}}
Fill in the password field with {{LOGIN_PASSWORD}}
Submit the login form
Verify the login submission state is reflected in the UI
Verify the user can complete sign in from the login form
